description:
Two Project fields are missing edit capability in ProjectSidebar:
1. `members` â€” rendered as `project.members?.join(', ')` with no add/remove UI
2. `color` â€” field exists on the Project type but is never displayed or editable anywhere

**What to do:**
- Members: replace the read-only display with a tag-input component â€” add member (text input + enter), remove member (Ă—). Call `useProjectUpdate` on change.
- Color: add a color swatch/picker control to the sidebar. Use a simple color input or a small preset palette. Reflect the chosen color in the project list (colored left border or badge). Call `useProjectUpdate` on change.

**Files to touch:**
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/components/project-sidebar.tsx`
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/projects-list.tsx` (for color display in list)
title: Project page: add members edit UI and project color picker to sidebar
